rationale: The current translation is already based on the high-quality candidate ce50553948aa737b46a6106590cbcd48f5e41b07 and has already had the high-priority path fixes applied (e.g., '../' prefix for cover images). It correctly translates the ASCII diagram labels which were missing in earlier iterations, maintains Dan's direct style, and preserves MDX structure. No further high-priority fixes are required.
